description: Deterministic sidecar extension to pwg_sources.py's pwgbib resolver (D8: no LLM, no synthesised sources). Currently empty of literal string mappings -- the one addition this pass made (the "ebend[a]." ibid pattern) is a RULE, applied in extend_ls_coverage.py itself (IBID_RE), not a per-string map entry, since it matches a class of tokens rather than one fixed source name.
